description: An inventory analyst needs to forecast demand for a seasonal item (e.g., winter coats) to inform purchasing decisions.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the sales history for the item for the past three years.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully pulls the historical sales data.

nodes.task_description: Apply a seasonal forecasting model to the historical data to predict demand for the upcoming season.

expected_outcome.expected: The system generates a demand forecast, showing an expected peak in November.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report with the forecast and recommended purchasing plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates an actionable report for the buying team.
